title: DoodleForge Apparel
description: A high-end ecommerce platform for custom-printed doodle apparel. Features a full-stack checkout experience, real-time shipping calculations, and a high-performance inventory management system forged for scale.

title: Cubic Schematic
description: A high-precision 3D simulation of a Rubik's Cube. Built with React Three Fiber and Three.js, focusing on complex geometric rotations and real-time lighting within a digital forge environment.

title: SveltyCMS Core
description: Open-source contribution focused on a major backend architecture overhaul. Consolidated data controllers and optimized structural logic to improve system stability and developer ergonomics.

title: Kinetic Sketch
description: A fluid character animation engine exploring physics-based movement and skeletal constraints. Forged to test the boundaries of real-time 2D motion.

title: Peripheral Workbench
description: [Under Construction] A specialized diagnostic suite for calibrating and testing computer peripherals. Engineered to validate latency, input precision, and polling rates.
